title: ARM Cortex-M Series

introduction.definition: A group of 32-bit RISC ARM processor cores optimized for low-cost and energy-efficient microcontrollers.

detailed_theory:
Cortex-M0/M0+: Lowest power/area.
Cortex-M3: Balanced performance.
Cortex-M4: Adds DSP instructions and optional FPU.
Cortex-M7: High-performance, double-precision FPU, cache.
Registers include R0-R15. Nested Vectored Interrupt Controller (NVIC) manages the interrupt system.
